title: What pushed Australia to reportedly cancel Sneako’s visa? streamer responds with bold clarification
summary_full: Streamer Nico Sneako became part of a major controversy after reports claimed Australia cancelled his visa and issued a lifetime ban. Australian minister Tony Burke reportedly took the action over concerns related to hateful content. Sneako denied being deported and said he voluntarily left Australia after finishing his South East Asia trip and meetings in Sydney and Melbourne.
